2603.23867.title: Can VLMs Reason Robustly? A Neuro-Symbolic Investigation
2603.23867.paper_summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have been applied to a wide range of reasoning tasks, yet it remains unclear whether they can reason robustly under distribution shifts. In this paper, we study covariate shifts in which the perceptual input distribution changes while the underlying prediction rules do not. To investigate this question, we consider visual deductive reasoning tasks, where a model is required to answer a query given an image and logical rules defined over the object concepts in the image. Empirically, we find that VLMs fine-tuned through gradient-based end-to-end training can achieve high in-distribution accuracy but fail to generalize under such shifts, suggesting that fine-tuning does not reliably induce the underlying reasoning function. This motivates a neuro-symbolic perspective that decouples perception from reasoning. However, we further observe that recent neuro-symbolic approaches that rely on black-box components for reasoning can still exhibit inconsistent robustness across tasks. To address this issue, we propose VLC, a neuro-symbolic method that combines VLM-based concept recognition with circuit-based symbolic reasoning. In particular, task rules are compiled into a symbolic program, specifically a circuit, which executes the rules exactly over the object concepts recognized by the VLM. Experiments on three visual deductive reasoning tasks with distinct rule sets show that VLC consistently achieves strong performance under covariate shifts, highlighting its ability to support robust reasoning.
2603.23867.paper_summary_zh: 視覺-語言模型（VLMs）已被應用於各種推理任務，但仍不清楚它們在分佈變化下是否能夠穩健推理。<lb/>在本文中，我們研究了協變變化，即感知輸入分佈發生變化，而基本預測規則不變。<lb/>為了探討這個問題，我們考慮了視覺演繹推理任務，在這些任務中，模型需要根據圖像和定義在圖像物體概念上的邏輯規則來回答查詢。<lb/>實證研究發現，通過基於梯度的端到端訓練微調的VLMs可以在內部分佈中達到高準確率，但在這種變化下卻無法泛化，這表明微調並不能可靠地引入基本的推理功能。<lb/>這促使我們採取一種神經-符號的視角，將感知與推理解耦。<lb/>然而，我們進一步觀察到，最近依賴黑箱組件進行推理的神經-符號方法在不同任務中仍然可能表現出不一致的穩健性。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們提出了VLC，一種結合基於VLM的概念識別與基於電路的符號推理的神經-符號方法。<lb/>具體而言，任務規則被編譯成一個符號程序，特別是一個電路，該電路在VLM識別的物體概念上精確執行這些規則。<lb/>在三個具有不同規則集的視覺演繹推理任務上的實驗顯示，VLC在協變變化下始終能夠實現強大的性能，突顯其支持穩健推理的能力。
2603.23867.author: Weixin Chen et.al.
2603.23867.authors: Weixin Chen, Antonio Vergari, Han Zhao
